manifest.name: open-library
manifest.author: DreamLayer Team
manifest.description: Look at a book, get the story behind it — author, year, subjects and where it sits in the canon, from the Open Library open dataset. No account, no key.
manifest.forwho: For readers, browsers, and anyone who picks a book up and wonders about it.
long: Gives TasteLens something to rank a shelf of books on. Look at a cover and it pulls the title, author, first-published year, and subjects.
Straight from the Open Library community dataset — free, no API key, no account.
Your reading stays on your device. The only thing that leaves is the title, so it can look the book up.
